prompt: Find the singleton settings document first, then prepare a dry-run Sanity patch that sets announcement.enabled to true and announcement.text to 'Holiday shipping starts today'. Use the real configured dataset for the read, but keep this benchmark run dry-run only and do not submit the mutation.
assertions: The output first discovers or queries the settings document instead of assuming a hardcoded ID.
The output produces a targeted patch payload for announcement.enabled and announcement.text.
The output clearly states that no mutation was submitted and does not execute a write.
